text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I make my way to the exit after<n>watching a
race, I notice an<n>Umamusume holding her head in<n>
despair.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaah... Business has been so bad<n>lately. At
this rate, the future of my<n>Golshi-brand yakisoba
will go up in<n>delicious smoke...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there! Gimme an idea on<n>how to pull my
business out of its<n>freewheeling nosedive!
choice_data_list:
Why don't you try improving the flavor of your
yakisoba?

Why don't you try selling grilled akashiyaki
dumplings?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If I make it any tastier than it already<n>is, it'll
jeopardize all the other<n>yakisoba joints in the
galaxy!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Mediocre quality brings more peace<n>of mind...
Which means!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The flavor is fine just as it is! Yeaaah,<n>buddy! I
have no idea why, but I'm<n>pumped!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Get outta here! Of all the things you<n>could've
suggested, akashiyaki?!<n>Everyone knows
takoyaki would've<n>been the better suggestion!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Besides, the galactic economy would<n>go haywire
if I sell anything other than<n>yakisoba!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
As a token of my gratitude, I'll tell ya<n>the most
important thing when it<n>comes to making
takoyaki.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You listening? It's all about rhythm.<n>Start off nice
and gentle, then crank up<n>the speed at the end!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ya gotta feel the beat too, yo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Start off gentle then gradually speed<n>up... That
might actually be a good tip<n>when running on
certain tracks...
